name: Coastal
description_short: Coastal is a farm and ranch supply retailer offering agricultural products, livestock feed, fencing, and bedding materials with in-store pickup and online ordering.
description_long:
Coastal Farm & Ranch is a physical retail chain specializing in agricultural, livestock, and country living supplies. The company operates multiple store locations and maintains an e-commerce presence at coastalcountry.com, serving rural and suburban customers with farming and ranching needs.

The company offers a wide range of products including animal feed (layer pellets, specialty mixes), bedding materials (pine pellets), fencing supplies (t-posts, cattle panels), and related agricultural equipment. They emphasize convenience through online ordering with in-store pickup or curbside service, plus free shipping on orders over $99. Their product lineup includes both budget and premium options across feed types and qualities.

Coastal differentiates itself through a Best Price Guarantee program and a proprietary credit card (Coastal Credit Card) for customer loyalty. They highlight made-in-USA product options and maintain inventory across multiple store locations with real-time stock visibility online. The company also operates a Pro-Sales division, suggesting B2B or professional farmer segments.

However, Coastal is fundamentally a general merchandise retailer, not a financial services or consumer finance provider. The presence of a Coastal Credit Card is a standard retail loyalty tool, not evidence of consumer lending or financial products. This company has been miscategorized and should be removed from or recategorized on a consumer finance platform.
pros: Free in-store pickup and curbside service available
Real-time inventory visibility across multiple store locations
Mix of budget and premium product options
Loyalty credit card program for customer savings
cons: Not a financial services provider—miscategorized on consumer finance platform
No consumer lending, credit products, or payday alternatives offered
Website content shows retail farm supply business only, not financial services
best_for: Rural and suburban farmers and ranchers
diagnosis: This company should not be listed on a consumer finance platform. Coastal is a farm and ranch retail chain offering agricultural supplies, not financial products or services. Remove from payday-alternatives category and financial services databases.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
